case_title: REZA ESMAILI VS. FILLMORE GRILL LLC

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESMAILI, REZA AS TO DEFENDANT FILLMORE GRILL LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DBA LONG BAR & BISTRO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
